pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; without this change, the code would be compiled for Java 17, potentially missing new language features or causing incompatibilities with Java 21-specific APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release version in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21, aligning with the property change and guaranteeing correct bytecode generation for the target JDK.
